title: ChainGPT Final Audit Report
adjudication_summary: The finding 'Reentrancy Vulnerability' is confirmed as reentrancy is a well-documented issue with serious implications. 'Lack of Access Control' is considered plausible due to the severity of unauthorized function calls, but it requires further verification. 'Gas Limit Issues' are classified as unsupported, as this finding typically demands concrete evidence of gas wastefulness leading to failure, which isn't demonstrated here.
